title: B1 Listening Part 1 - Test 37
instructions: For each question, listen to the short recording and choose the correct picture: A, B or C.

questions.context: You hear two students talking about what to take on a beach clean-up.
questions.audio_script: Woman: Are you ready for the beach clean-up tomorrow? I was going to pack a shorts, because that seemed useful. || Man: I read the message from school again. You do not need that. || Woman: What about a plastic gloves? || Man: Not really. [1]The teacher says everyone should bring a beach ball because students must pick up rubbish safely[/1]. || Woman: Thanks. I will put it in my bag now, before I forget. || Man: Good plan. We have to leave early in the morning. || Man: That gives us enough time, so let's not worry.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Thanks. I will put it in my bag now, before I forget.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Good plan. We have to leave early in the morning.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: That gives us enough time, so let's not worry.

questions.context: You hear two people talking about travelling to the hospital.
questions.audio_script: Girl: How are you getting to the hospital tomorrow? I thought you were going to take the bike. || Boy: I was, but I do not want to ride in traffic. || Girl: Could you use the bus instead? || Boy: I checked, but it stops at the wrong entrance. [1]I am going to take the taxi because it can take me to the main door[/1]. || Girl: That sounds sensible. I will meet you near the entrance when you arrive. || Boy: Great. I will send a message if I am late.

dialogue.text: How are you getting to the hospital tomorrow? I thought you were going to take the bike.

questions.context: You hear two people choosing food at a food stall.
questions.audio_script: Man: Have you chosen what to eat at the food stall? The queue is moving quickly now. || Boy: I nearly chose the noodles, and I also looked at the rice. || Man: They both look fine to me. || Boy: Maybe, but the noodles are hot and the rice looks cold. [1]I am going to have the vegetable wrap[/1]. It should be enough before we leave. || Man: Good choice. I will order mine after you, and then we can sit near the window. || Man: That gives us enough time, so let's not worry.

questions.context: You hear two people talking about a lost camera.
questions.audio_script: Woman: Did you find your camera? You looked everywhere this morning. || Man: Not at first. I went back to the park bench, because I remembered taking photos of trees there. || Woman: What about the restaurant? You were there later. || Man: I checked, but it was not there. Then my a waiter called and said [1]my camera was on the shelf near the window[/1]. I must have left it there before school. || Woman: That is lucky. You need it today, don't you? || Man: Yes, I'll collect it before lunch.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Did you find your camera? You looked everywhere this morning.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Not at first. I went back to the park bench, because I remembered taking photos of trees there.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: What about the restaurant? You were there later.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: I checked, but it was not there. Then my a waiter called and said my camera was on the shelf near the window. I must have left it there before school.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: That is lucky. You need it today, don't you?

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Yes, I'll collect it before lunch.

questions.context: You hear two people talking about buying new school item.
questions.audio_script: Man: I need to buy new school item, but I cannot decide. I first thought about a calculator. || Woman: That might be nice. What about a pencil case? || Man: I looked at one, but it was too expensive. In the end, [1]I chose a dictionary because our English teacher says we need one this term[/1]. || Woman: That sounds useful, and it is better than buying something just because it looks pretty. || Man: I agree. I will wrap it when I get home tonight. || Man: That gives us enough time, so let's not worry.

questions.context: You hear two people talking about a part-time job at a library.
questions.audio_script: Boy: What job are you doing at the library this afternoon? I thought you had to repair computers. || Girl: I did last week, but a technician is coming. || Boy: Are you going to read to children then? || Girl: No, because that starts tomorrow. The manager just told me that [1]I need to put returned books away[/1]. || Boy: That sounds easier than the other jobs. || Girl: Maybe, but I still have to finish before five, because the place gets busy then. || Girl: That gives us enough time, so let's not worry.

questions.context: You hear two people talking about jobs at home.
questions.audio_script: Woman: What job do you have to do at home before the party? I thought you were going to blow up balloons. || Man: No, my cousin is doing that. || Woman: Then are you going to bake a cake? || Man: Not today, because we bought one already. Mum said [1]my job is to move chairs into the garden[/1]. || Woman: That should not take too long. || Man: I hope not. I want to finish before my friend comes round, so we can go out together. || Man: That gives us enough time, so let's not worry.
